ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use https://gitlab.com for GitLab.com, or your self-managed GitLab URL.
ast.target: 使用 https://gitlab.com 访问 GitLab.com，或您自托管的 GitLab URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Token used with the private-token header. Minimum required scope: read_user.
ast.target: 用于 private-token 头的令牌。最低所需权限范围：read_user。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Section heading used in daily notes for imported activities.
ast.target: 用于导入活动的每日笔记中的章节标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: GitLab API page size. Maximum is 100.
ast.target: GitLab API 页面大小。最大值为 100。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Safety cap for pagination to avoid very large imports.
ast.target: 分页的安全上限，以避免导入数据量过大。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a daily note first, then run the import command.
ast.target: 请先打开一个每日笔记，然后运行导入命令。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not determine the date from the note title. Use a file name like 2026-03-14 or 20260314.
ast.target: 无法从笔记标题中确定日期。请使用类似 2026-03-14 或 20260314 的文件名。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Import GitLab activities into current daily note
ast.target: 将 GitLab 活动导入当前每日笔记
